pageContext.name: Himiko Toga
pageContext.description: From TV anime, My Hero Academia , three-dimensional Himiko Toga from the enemy villain alliance! Himiko Toga's quirk is she can transform into a person by ingesting another person's blood.  Armed parts such as syringes and knives for ingesting blood are partly magnetized and can be removed. Characteristic sharp canines and delicate eyes are attractively reproduced, and bloody effect parts placed on the pedestal and three-dimensional sound effects further enhance her charm.  Be sure to add this collectible figure to your collection today!
